infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: FitTrack uses the camera to capture workout progress photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: FitTrack accesses your photo library to set a profile picture or log workout photos.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: FitTrack uses your location to track outdoor runs and workouts.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: FitTrack may use the microphone for video recordings during workouts.

plugins.cameraPermission: FitTrack uses the camera to capture workout progress photos.

plugins.photosPermission: FitTrack accesses your photos to set a profile picture.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: FitTrack uses location to track outdoor workouts.
